settings.text: Online Exclusive Deal Enjoy 30% off on selected items when you shop at Jaspal.com.This promotion is valid from 3 March 2026 to 8 March 2026.

HOW TO GET A SPECIAL OFFER

Shop category: 

  • Women/Online Exclusive Deal
  • Men/Online Exclusive Deal
  • Pet Accessories/Online Exclusive Deal
  • The price displayed is the promotional price.
  • This promotion is valid for eligible products only.
  • *This promotion cannot be combined with any other discounts or promotions.

TERMS AND CONDITIONS APPLY

  • By participating in this promotion, you confirm that you have read and agreed to the terms and conditions outlined on our website. For more information, please visit: https://www.jaspal.com/policies/terms-of-service
  • Once your order is confirmed, it cannot be modified or canceled.
  • The company reserves the right to reject any returned or exchanged items, including promotional items, in any circumstance.
  • Shipping cost is not included.
  • The offers cannot be exchanged for cash or other items or transferred to others.
  • Find further details about our returns and exchanges policy at https://www.jaspal.com/policies/refund-policy
  • For additional information, don't hesitate to contact us at Tel: 02-118-2000 or email: customerservice@jaspal.co.th. Our office hours are Monday through Sunday, 09:00 to 18:00.
